taxonomy: Dupatya nubigena is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. The genus Dupatya is a part of the heath family, and it is native to the Himalayan region. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and has been classified as an evergreen shrub. The species name nubigena translates to "cloud-dwelling" in Latin, which refers to its native habitat in the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. This classification places Dupatya nubigena within the broader category of flowering plants.
